title: helianthemum polifolium var. lineare
intro: Helianthemum polifolium var. lineare, also known as a narrow-leaved rockrose, is a flowering plant species within the family Cistaceae. It is used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which help to soothe wounds, reduce pain and inflammation, and combat infections. The plant's extracts have been traditionally used to promote wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues, showcasing its potential health benefits. In herbal preparations, Helianthemum polifolium var. lineare is often used to make infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be applied topically or taken internally under the guidance of a healthcare professional.
